projects.name: Revenue Unlock Sprint
projects.description: 30-day sprint to close the $43K → $100K MRR gap. Five workstreams: (1) Wire up AI DM Closer checkout + AI Audit Quiz form, (2) Triage 116 unresponded Sendblue convos, (3) Build VIP ascension trigger system — auto-flag Premium members ready for upgrade, (4) Launch n8n content intelligence scraper for competitor + performance insights, (5) Create 3 new Meta creatives in Kim Pep Talk style with fresh angles. Target: 44 more VIP clients + $16K low-ticket revenue stream.
